creator: bmah@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

This PR has been overtaken by a number of changes to pkg_version. 
One thing that I *should* fix is the style of code; alas pkg_version 
has changed too much to apply the patch verbatim. 

My apologies for not being able to use this patch, but I do thank 
you for submitting it.
